TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKFourByteTag extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag>

Docs.summary: Represents a four-byte tag packed into a 32-bit unsigned integer in big-endian byte order.

Docs.param: The raw unsigned integer representing the four-byte tag.

Docs.param: The first character, stored in the high byte.
The fourth character, stored in the low byte.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from four individual characters.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag Parse (string? tag);
.method public static hidebysig valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag Parse(string tag) cil managed

Docs.param: The string to parse. Only the first four characters are used; shorter strings are padded with spaces. or empty strings return a zero-valued tag.
Docs.summary: Creates an by parsing a string of up to four characters.
Docs.returns: An representing the parsed tag; strings shorter than four characters are padded with spaces.

MemberSignature.Value: public override string ToString ();
.method public hidebysig virtual instance string ToString() cil managed

Docs.summary: Returns the four-character string representation of this tag.
Docs.returns: A four-character string formed by unpacking the four bytes of the tag value in big-endian order.
